title: Jet Set
subTitle: Gill throws everything she has in her Spanish safari from the countryside town of Toledo, seventy kilometers south of Madrid; Richard visits the tiny island of Providenciales, part of the Turks and Caicos Islands in the Caribbean.

title: Jet Set
subTitle: In the penultimate episode Richard remains in the Turks and Caicos Islands, only this time he's visiting the exclusive island resort of Parrot Cay; Gill is combining a city and beach break in the Portuguese capital of Lisbon.

title: The Jet Set
subTitle: Gill tours North West France's gastronomy, tasting famous oysters; Richard swims with dolphins and stingrays.

subTitle: Following the Great Wall west, Ash heads to Inner Mongolia to meet up with a nomadic family and to try Mongolian wrestling; he's hoping to visit Naadam Festival, which features a key part of Mongolian culture, horseracing.

subTitle: Alana's back in her hometown of Mildura; Scotty taps into his creative side in Melbourne and then continues his trip through the Kimberley with stops in Bells Gorge and Mount Hart.

subTitle: Scotty checks out what the Kimberley has on offer; Alana travels to Bucharest, Romania; Skye samples a Vietnamese treat in the Barossa.

title: Jet Set
subTitle: From freezing temperatures to a tropical paradise.

title: Jet Set
subTitle: Richard immerses himself in Thai culture, picking his own rice, learning to cook Thai style with a local chef and paying a visit to a retired elephant park; Gill heads to the Italian city of Venice, for a cheeky Bellini in Harry's Bar.

subTitle: Culinary inspiration in Sardinia.

subTitle: Two foodies travel through Sicily with a donkey and must decide whether to have it slaughtered after spending three days with it.

subTitle: Two foodies travel through Thailand with a pig and must decide whether to have it slaughtered after spending three days with it.

title: Capturing Winter
subTitle: Cinematographer Guido Perrini has created many of the most revered ski and snowboard films; following him and multi-talented athlete Géraldine Fasnacht on a snowboarding and base jumping adventure in some of the most stunning peaks in the Swiss Alps.

title: Capturing Winter
subTitle: Layla Kerley is a self-taught adventure photographer and one of the few females in her field; together with Bruno Compagnet, co-founder of freeski brand Blackcrows, they plan to traverse one of the last wildernesses in Europe: the Italian Dolomites.

title: 7 Days
subTitle: Kevin travels to Switzerland and has 24 hours to go from Zurich to the Swiss mountains, while Jalou finds an exciting way to go from Cannes to Corsica.

title: 7 Days
subTitle: Jalou has 24 hours to go from Barcelona to Tarragona where she conquers the Catalonian mountains with her mountain bike. Kevin tries to beat her in Slovenia.

title: 7 Days
subTitle: Kevin is in Suriname, while thousands of miles away, Jalou goes through the trees in an Australian forest.

title: Roads End
subTitle: Rob and Dave reach the end of their incredible journey and must go back to where it all started, in Buenos Aires.

title: Roads End
subTitle: Rob and Dave make a toast to their recently finished trip rough riding across Argentina.

title: Roads End
subTitle: Rob and Dave relive some more of the highlights from their incredible 6000km journey.

title: Around the World in 80 Tricks
subTitle: Bones is in South Korea, where he visits a Taekwondo group, the K Tigers, a tarot card reader and reveals the secret to the perfect card shuffle.

title: Around the World in 80 Tricks
subTitle: This time, Magical Bones is in Seoul. He goes to the B-Boy championships and visits his friend Ji, who owns a vintage shop to perform a spectacular trick on a shirt.

title: Around the World in 80 Tricks
subTitle: Pete takes to the streets of India's capital city, Delhi. He performs a series of fun and baffling tricks for locals and visitors, including a levitation attempt.

title: Beyond the Beaten Path
subTitle: The brothers use a Felucca Boat to travel north along the Nile, from the oasis town of Aswan to the ancient city of Luxor, before finding a massive sand dune to slide down.

title: Beyond the Beaten Path
subTitle: Lapland is a frozen, winterland of reindeer, Sami people and saunas; the brothers start in Stockholm and fly 200 kilometers straight north above the Arctic Circle; their chosen mode of transport for this journey is a reindeer sleigh.

title: Beyond the Beaten Path
subTitle: The brothers start out with a near death boat disaster in the southern Philippine Sea, but bounce back; they then end up attaining their goal of reaching Donsol village.

title: Road Less Traveled
subTitle: Jonathan hangs out with a group of fishermen that utilize ancient Chinese fishing nets designed in the time of Kublai Khan.

title: Road Less Traveled
subTitle: Jonathan reveals an exclusive insight into the inner workings of the show, behind the scenes clips, along with never before seen footage and segments.

title: Road Less Traveled
subTitle: After a leisurely bike ride around scenic Amsterdam and the Dutch countryside, Jonathan sticks out a thumb and catches a class E 400 meter long container ship en route to Morocco.

title: Travels with the Bondi Vet
subTitle: Chris searches for the old and new in one of the world's most amazing cities; he also meets a local that makes people smile and goes on the trail of the elusive platypus.

title: Travels with the Bondi Vet
subTitle: Chris searches for the old and new in one of the world's most amazing cities; he also meets a local that makes people smile and goes on the trail of the elusive platypus.

title: Travels with the Bondi Vet
subTitle: Chris cruises China's Yangtze river, explores the tunnels beneath the streets of Sydney, discovers the Aussie travel spot that is almost too good to be true and faces a test to enter heaven.

title: Travels with the Bondi Vet
subTitle: Chris muscles up for an English challenge; he meets China's cricket king; he then receives a fashion makeover in Vietnam; he also meets his mini match in a fellow animal lover and wildlife warrior.

subTitle: Bill has three quests; going to the top of the tallest building in the world; tracking rare desert wildlife, especially the oryx; stepping back in time before the modern skyscrapers to when the locals lived a nomadic Bedouin lifestyle.

subTitle: Piri gravity fishes in Rakiura, targeting hapuka, crayfish and trumpeter; he meets with local elder Phil Smith to learn about Stewart Island's history.

subTitle: Piri is on Tuhua Island, hosted by brothers Patukino and Tiraariki Wiiliams; Piri dives with Patukino and fishes with Tiraariki.

subTitle: Max and Benj Cave travel to France where they are challenged to create a run in historic Lisses.

subTitle: Brothers shun the more famous areas of Tokyo and Kyoto and head to the isolated, ancient island of Shikoku; their route is the ancient 88 Temple Zen pilgrimage circuit.

title: Khanh Ong's Wild Food
subTitle: Chef Khanh Ong takes a ride on the Spirit of Tasmania to explore Northern Tasmania and tries hunting of a different kind, harvesting a local crop and gets an insight into cooking with a protein only available in Tasmania.

subTitle: Chef Khanh Ong explores Southern Tasmania and braves the mighty South Pacific Ocean in search of the southern bluefin tuna with fisherman Chris Podesta. He then heads to the highlands to learn the art of fly-fishing.

subTitle: Yann Horowitz explores Switzerland; he visits Lugano's Morel Oops Bar and The Warriors; he samples Basel's cuisine and engages in DIY activities with Oli and Claudia; he discovers underground love in Bern.

subTitle: The team checks out some inventive architecture and new design ideas; they explore a house that has invited street art inside.

subTitle: Will Skudin and Keali'i Mamala deal with the trials and tribulations of life as traveling big wave surfers.

subTitle: Big wave surfing's elite break routines and converge to ride an unforgettable swell at Mavericks.

subTitle: Deepak, Ashique, and Freddie explore South Kerala; they experience Kalaripayattu martial arts, ride Royal Enfields through scenic landscapes, taste local toddy and cuisine, and compete in a snake boat race, immersing in Kerala's culture.

title: Car & Country Quest
subTitle: Ashique leads an adventure through North Kerala, driving Ferraris and Lamborghinis as well as experiencing a train ride across the Indian region; the trio enjoys wildlife, a mountain camping trip, a night safari, immersing in North Kerala's culture.

subTitle: The hosts explore Italy, starting with trike rides around Lake Garda; they experience gladiator combat, drive classic cars through the countryside and learn winemaking in Barolo.

subTitle: Rob and Dave are pushed to their limits, riding across scorching sand dunes; Rob is unable to continue.

subTitle: Jonathan fights Muy Thai battles, visits a world class Thai massage school, and tries to outwit Bankok's infamous scam artists.

subTitle: Magic rituals and witch doctors await Jonathan as he trundles through the capital city of Jakarta. Later, he seeks refuge from the bizzare superstition in one of the most secluded communities in the world.

subTitle: Jamie Hancock was raised in Houston's South Park area, a place notorious for gang violence, but also where hip hop artists created a new sound; new positive message is being created today by people like Jamie through music.

subTitle: Los Angeles based electronic music producer and DJ Moe Espinosa, aka Drumcell, has created sonic soundscapes which tell cinematic stories with his music; Moe has a vision that remains independent.

title: Travel Quest
subTitle: Seeing a jaguar in the wild is nearly impossible but working with one of the leading jaguar experts, Bill assists in a prey/predator study to get the best chance; in the process, he comes literally face to face with an 18 foot long Amazon Anaconda.

title: Travel Quest
subTitle: Violent oceans, giant icebergs and incredible scenery are all in a day's work in the southern continent; Bill shadows penguin researchers as they take population counts of a fascinating bird.

title: Travel Quest
subTitle: Bill ventures deep into the rainforest following the trail of headhunters, only to discover secrets that are even more surprising and deadly.

subTitle: Piri heads to Kapiti to go fishing for tuna and try his hand at spearfishing on the West Coast; Piri gets the lowdown on native birds in the area from Wayne Spratt.

subTitle: Francesca Chiorando uncovers Edinburgh's gruesome past, back when grave robbing, body snatching and murder were rife.

subTitle: Australia's favorite playground, the Gold Coast, to prove family vacations can have it all; fun and education; beach and the rainforest; roller coasters and wildlife; a destination both beautiful and fun.
